calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Application For Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Motion for Default Judgment as to defendant ELeana F. Plass.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Charles Correia, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Simon C. Ward Brown, Litigation Ambassador Principal for Nationstar Mortgage as witnesss for plaintiff Bank of America N.A., was present via ZOOM Video Conference, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Eleana F. Plass.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Reformation and Declaratory Relief was filed on March 27, 2019.
Notice of Pendency of Action (Lis Pendens) was filed on May 17, 2019.
Application for Service of Summons by Publication of defendant Eleana F. Plass was filed on July 12, 2019.
Proof of Publication was filed on April 8,2020.
Default was entered at to defendant Eleana F. Plass on May 12, 2020.
DOE defendants were DISMISSED without prejudice on July 13, 2020.
Request for Judicial Notice in Support of plaintiff's request for Default Judgment was filed July 28, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Eleana F. Plass.

Reformed Deed of Trust for the Real Property located at 4171 4173 17th Street, San Francisco, CA 94114.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
